# Delton Quizz

> AI-powered gamified quiz platform with live multiplayer, tournaments, daily challenges, leaderboards, and study tools.

Delton Quizz turns studying into a game. Players generate AI quizzes on any topic, compete in real-time multiplayer rooms, climb global leaderboards, and review answers with detailed explanations. Visual quizzes (flags, biology diagrams, anime characters, brand logos) and PDF-to-quiz import are supported.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Landing page with quick start, daily challenge, and category sidebar.
- [Categories](/categories): Browse all quiz categories and visual quiz types.
- [Dashboard](/dashboard): Personal dashboard with stats, streak, and recent activity.
- [Leaderboard](/leaderboard): Global player rankings by score.
- [Multiplayer](/multiplayer): Create or join live multiplayer quiz rooms.
- [Tournament](/tournament): Bracket-based tournaments with multiple players.
- [Study](/study): Spaced-repetition flashcards generated from quizzes.
- [Create Quiz](/create): Build a custom quiz manually or from a PDF.
- [Join Quiz](/join): Join a multiplayer room by code.
- [Friends](/friends): Manage friends and challenges.
- [Quiz History](/history): Past quiz attempts and reviews.
- [Analytics](/analytics): Performance charts by topic and difficulty.
- [Recommendations](/recommendations): Personalized quiz suggestions.

## Optional

- [Profile](/profile): User profile and settings.
- [Sign In](/auth): Authentication.
